name: Trail Bread
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: St. Louis Post-Dispatch, 4/7/97
Preheat the oven to 300 degrees.
Combine all ingredients and mix well.
Bake in a large roasting pan or in two jelly roll pans for approximately one hour.
Yield: About 35 servings.
Note: High-protein bread originated with the French and was a staple for trappers and traders back to the 1700s.
